metadata.title: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) SPoC
metadata.remarks: Strict SPoC profile derived from the official PCI DSS v4.0.1 SAQ SPoC (October 2024). Requirement identifiers sourced directly from the published SAQ document.

revision.title: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) SPoC v4.0.0
revision.remarks:
New Self-Assessment Questionnaire for merchants using Software-based PIN entry on COTS (SPoC) solutions.
This SAQ is for use with PCI DSS v4.0.

revision.title: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) SPoC v4.0.1
revision.remarks:
Updated to align with PCI DSS v4.0.1. For details of PCI DSS changes, see PCI DSS Summary of Changes from PCI DSS Version 4.0 to 4.0.1.
Added ASV Resource Guide to section 'Additional PCI SSC Resources.'

citation.text: PCI-DSS-v4-0-1-SAQ-SPoC.pdf, © 2006–2024 PCI SSC. All Rights Reserved.
citation.remarks: Requirement identifiers were extracted directly from the uploaded SAQ document, which defines requirements 3.1-3.3.1.2, 8.3-8.3.1, 9.1-9.5.1.3, and 12.1-12.10.1.
